---
title: "\'The cyclone at Masulipatam\'"
---

## \'The cyclone at Masulipatam\'

**Author:** Francis Brandt
**Date:** 1865
**Imprint:** <i>MP</i> (March 1865) 319-327

### Notes

The article is signed \'F. B.\'.  It was evidently sent to CMY by one of the sisters of Francis Brandt (1839/40-1925), the assistant collector on whose letters it is based.  His three sisters were Margaret Sophia Brandt (1831/2-1892), Emily Charlotte Brandt (1834/5-1926) and Margaret [sic] Adelaide Brandt (1845/6-1904).  No doubt the additional text was composed by one of them, but it is not possible to say which.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
